name: FreeToGame API
description: Access a comprehensive database of free-to-play games and free MMO games. Provides information about game titles, genres, descriptions, developers, publishers, release dates, official websites, and more. No authentication required. Free for personal and commercial use with attribution to FreeToGame.com.
